summary: Iteration 3 (Weekly AI Insights) backend testing complete. All 9 new tests for /api/insights/weekly pass; full regression of 52 tests (43 prior + 9 new) also green. Claude Sonnet 4.5 generates real insight content (~5-10s per call), stats aggregation correct (mood_counts, avg_mood_score, dominant_mood), 24h staleness flag working, auth gating + cross-tenant isolation verified, empty-history returns 400 with Indonesian message.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1226 lines - still over 700-line guideline; recommend extracting insights/mood/journal into separate routers in next iteration.

POST /api/insights/weekly always generates a new doc on every call; the iteration 3 spec mentions 'Cached for 24h'. The current implementation only EXPOSES staleness via is_stale flag but does not throttle generation. Consider returning existing cached doc on POST if created_at < 24h ago (or document that the throttle is enforced client-side). Currently a user could rack up Claude cost by spamming POST.
_generate_weekly_insight catches generic Exception and returns 500 with the raw exception string in detail; consider sanitising error text before exposing to clients.

_build_insight_stats parses created_at as a string-prefixed ISO. The $gte comparison on ISO strings works only because all timestamps are stored as ISO-8601 UTC strings (lexicographic order = chronological). This is brittle - consider storing native BSON datetimes.
Index db.weekly_insights uses (user_id,1) + (created_at,-1) as separate calls if create_index is called twice; verified single compound index in server.py:444 - good.
Insight doc returned to client embeds full stats again at top-level AND inside insight.stats - minor duplication but acceptable.
test_credentials: Admin admin@echoaid.com / Admin@EchoAid2026 verified. Iteration 3 tests create ephemeral users via register+verify+login (TEST_insA_*, TEST_insB_* prefixes).
seed_data_creation: Tests seed 5 mood entries for User A via POST /api/mood (calm, grateful, anxious, calm, low) to exercise stats aggregation. Expected avg_mood_score=3.2, dominant_mood=calm. User B left empty to verify isolation and empty-history 400.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 added /api/insights/weekly GET and POST. POST takes ~5-10s due to Claude Sonnet 4.5 call. Each POST creates a new doc in db.weekly_insights and GET returns most recent (sort created_at desc) with is_stale=(now - created_at) > 24h. Empty history => 400 with Indonesian 'Belum ada mood check-in atau jurnal minggu ini.' message. Mood scoring map: grateful=5 calm=4 neutral=3 low=2 anxious=1. No throttling on POST - user can regenerate unlimited times. Cross-tenant isolation works via user_id filter on Mongo queries. Iteration 1+2 regression still 100% green.
